request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that Germany's defense spending is still below 1.5% of GDP? While we're committed to our NATO allies, it's time to ask why some members expect full security benefits without meeting their financial obligations. Our alliance is strongest when everyone pulls their weight. #StrongAlliances #FairShare
